05-11-15) 

Renal dialysis services that are covered and paid for under the ESRD PPS, which include 
any item or service furnished to an ESRD beneficiary that is directly related to that 
individual's dialysis, are excluded from coverage under the Medicare home health 
benefit. However, to the extent that other requirements for coverage are met, an item or 
service that is not directly related to a patient's dialysis would be covered (e.g., a skilled 
nursing visit to furnish wound care for an
